items.headline: Fastly (NASDAQ: FSLY) Reports Record Q1 2026 Results and Raises Full-Year 2026 Guidance
Fastly Stock Plunges Over 40% Following Q1 2026 Earnings Reaction and Concerns on Core Delivery Slowdown
Raymond James Upgrades Fastly to Outperform, Citing AI Traffic Inflection and Sets $23 Price Target
Piper Sandler Cuts Fastly Price Target After Q1 Print, Highlighting Core Delivery Growth Concerns
